name: Scientific Papers MCP
what_it_does: MCP server providing AI agents with access to scientific literature — searching ArXiv, Semantic Scholar, and other academic paper databases. Enables agents to search for papers by topic, retrieve abstracts and metadata, download full-text PDFs, and integrate academic research into agent workflows for literature review, research assistance, and knowledge synthesis.
use_cases: Searching academic literature for research papers from research assistance agents
Retrieving paper abstracts and metadata from literature review agents
Finding related work and citations from academic writing agents
Staying current with new research publications from research monitoring agents
not_for: Accessing paywalled papers from publishers (only open access papers are freely available)
Citation management (use Zotero or Mendeley for reference management)
Real-time scientific news (preprints may not be peer-reviewed)
best_when: A researcher or developer wants AI agents to search and retrieve academic papers — particularly from open access sources like ArXiv for literature review, staying current with research, or synthesizing knowledge across papers.
avoid_when: You need peer-reviewed papers from closed-access journals — ArXiv focuses on preprints and not all fields are well-represented.

auth.notes: Semantic Scholar API key may be required for higher rate limits. ArXiv API is free and open. Configure based on which academic sources are enabled.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Academic paper APIs are generally free; rate limits apply
pricing.paid_tiers: None for MCP server; Semantic Scholar API is free
pricing.notes: Free open source. Academic paper APIs (ArXiv, Semantic Scholar) are free with rate limits.

performance.rate_limits: ArXiv: 3 req/second; Semantic Scholar: 100 req/5min without key, higher with key

known_agent_gotchas: ArXiv preprints are not peer-reviewed — flag this when using results in agents
Full-text PDF access may be limited for non-open-access papers
Academic search APIs have relatively low rate limits — avoid bulk downloading in loops
Search relevance varies — agents should cross-validate findings across multiple queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Academic paper data is public. HTTPS. Semantic Scholar API key needed for higher limits. No sensitive data involved. Responsible use requires citation and attribution in any derived content.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Public academic data. No sensitive information. Cite sources appropriately in derived content.
